mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, grade, major, knowledge_level, weak_points, interest_tags, lifecycle_stage, browse_count, register_days, update_time FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, grade, major, knowledge_level, browse_count, register_days, lifecycle_stage) SELECT u.id, u.grade, u.major, 0, 0, 0, 'newbie' FROM sys_user u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId})
